title: Dataset: Air Quality Dataset for Beijing
subtitle: Coverage: 2022-08-01 to 2026-02-17 | Historical AQI and pollutants
description: This dataset contains historical air quality time series for Beijing covering 2022-08-01 to 2026-02-17. It includes key air pollution indicators such as AQI indices and major pollutants, plus city metadata including coordinates, administrative areas, and population. Use this dataset to analyze long-run air quality trends in Beijing, compare Beijing with other cities, and build models that link air quality to urban characteristics. Air quality values are retrieved from the Open-Meteo Air Quality service using the cams_global domain, and city metadata is derived from the GeoNames city list. Nitiraj Kulkarni

resources.description: City identifiers, coordinates, admin areas, and population.
Historical air quality time series for the city.
